articles.title: Illinois MBE Participation Requirements — What Contractors Need to Know in 2026
articles.excerpt: A breakdown of current Minority Business Enterprise participation requirements on state-funded construction projects and how BCOE members can position themselves to qualify and compete.

articles.title: Mortenson Construction Deepens Relationship with BCOE — New Bid Opportunities Available
articles.excerpt: Mortenson's Sports & Entertainment group is actively seeking BCOE member subcontractors for upcoming projects. Learn how to connect and submit your firm for consideration.

articles.title: The Blueprint 2026 — Registration Now Open for Both Cohort Tracks
articles.excerpt: BCOE's Minority Construction Accelerator is accepting applications for the 2026 program year. Cohort A is open to all — Cohort B is exclusively for active BCOE members with self-performing companies.

articles.title: Member Spotlight — Share Your Story with BCOE
articles.excerpt: BCOE is actively seeking member success stories to feature in our news section and marketing materials. If your business has hit a milestone, won a major contract, or made community impact — we want to highlight you.

articles.title: 2026 BCOE Foundation Scholarship — Applications Close June 5
articles.excerpt: The BCOE Foundation is awarding $1,000 scholarships to minority students pursuing careers in construction and skilled trades. Applications are open now through June 5, 2026 at 5:00 PM CST.

articles.title: BCOE Annual Golf Outing — Scholarship Award Presentation June 22
articles.excerpt: Join us at BCOE's premier networking event of the year. This year's Golf Outing will also feature the annual scholarship award presentation recognizing the 2026 BCOE Foundation scholarship recipients.
